rules.name: Protected Time Blocks
rules.principle: Deep creative work requires uninterrupted blocks. Schedule them first, everything else around them.
rules.insight_template: When is your highest creative energy window in the day? Is it currently protected or colonized by meetings?

rules.name: Project Over Task
rules.principle: Think in projects, not tasks. Tasks without project context are just busyness.
rules.insight_template: What is the one creative project that would matter most if completed in the next 90 days?

rules.name: Resistance as Compass
rules.principle: The work you most resist is usually the work most worth doing.
rules.insight_template: What creative task have you been avoiding longest on {project}? That is where to start.

rules.name: Done List
rules.principle: Track what you completed, not just what remains. Completion momentum is real.
rules.insight_template: What have you shipped or completed on {project} in the last 30 days that deserves acknowledgment?

rules.name: Single Metric
rules.principle: One leading metric per creative project. Tracking everything means optimizing nothing.
rules.insight_template: What is the one number that, if it moved, would tell you {project} is genuinely succeeding?

rules.name: Maker Schedule
rules.principle: Makers need half-day minimum blocks. One meeting can destroy a full creative day.
rules.insight_template: How many half-day uninterrupted blocks do you have this week for {creative_work}?

rules.name: Finished Not Perfect
rules.principle: A finished imperfect work creates more value than an unfinished perfect one.
rules.insight_template: What definition of done would let you call {project} complete enough to share?

rules.name: Scope Containment
rules.principle: Scope creep is the primary killer of creative projects. Define and defend the boundary.
rules.insight_template: What features or elements could you cut from {project} without reducing its core value?

rules.name: Feedback Loops
rules.principle: Fast feedback loops accelerate creative quality. Get real reactions early and often.
rules.insight_template: Who could give you honest feedback on {project} within the next 7 days?

rules.name: Energy Matching
rules.principle: Match task type to energy level. Generate when high, edit when medium, admin when low.
rules.insight_template: Are you currently scheduling your hardest creative work during your lowest energy periods?
